untranslatable_reason: Diamond pattern detection requires multi-candle pattern recognition (identifying points B, top, bottom vertices, and computing diamond height). This geometric pattern analysis cannot be expressed using only single-bar price/indicator comparisons with the allowed operators. Pivot points (r1, s1) used as proxy for resistance/support levels, but true diamond formation identification is not translatable to rule-based conditions.
translation_notes: Signal describes a complex geometric pattern (diamond) with throwback validation and height-based projection. Converted to simpler resistance breakout with pullback using pivot levels as approximation. Entry on breakout above r1 (resistance), exit on break below s1 (support). Stop-loss set conservatively at 2.5% below entry. Author provided limited statistical data (69% success rate in bear, 17% decline); bullish regime targeting suggests reversal pattern anticipation.
